subject: Need Q3 deck before EOD — can you send?
snippet: Hey, the board call got moved to 4pm today. Can you send over the Q3 metrics deck ASAP so I can review before we jump on? Really appreciate it.

subject: Re: Contract renewal — deadline is Friday
snippet: Following up on the renewal terms we discussed. Our legal team needs a signed copy by Friday COB or we'll have to pause the engagement. Let me know if you need anything from our side.

subject: Interview scheduling — Thursday or Friday?
snippet: Hi! We'd love to set up the final round with our eng director. Does Thursday 2pm or Friday 10am PT work for you? Please let me know and I'll send a calendar invite.

subject: PR review needed — blocking deploy
snippet: Hey, my auth PR (#847) has been sitting for two days and it's blocking the staging deploy. Mind taking a look when you get a chance? Tagged you on the critical comments.

subject: Standup summary — March 19
snippet: Here's today's async standup summary: Tom — finished auth refactor, starting on billing. Mei — reviewing infra PR. Blocked: staging environment still flaky.

subject: All-hands this Thursday — save the date
snippet: Our Q1 all-hands is this Thursday at 11am PT. We'll cover OKR progress, a product demo, and some team news. Calendar invite going out shortly. Attendance is encouraged!

subject: FYI — prod deploy went out at 3pm
snippet: Just a heads up — I pushed the billing page fix to prod. Everything looks good in Datadog, no error spike. Keeping an eye on it for the next hour just in case.

subject: We published a new engineering blog post
snippet: Our latest post — 'How we cut p99 latency by 40% using connection pooling' — just went live. Would love if you shared it on socials if you found it useful!

subject: The Pragmatic Engineer: How big tech handles on-call
snippet: This week: a deep dive into on-call culture at Google, Meta, and Stripe — what works, what burns people out, and what smaller companies can learn from it.

subject: Lenny's Newsletter: The best onboarding flows I've seen
snippet: I've reviewed 200+ SaaS onboarding flows this year. Here are the 12 patterns that consistently drive activation — with annotated screenshots and teardowns.

subject: ByteByteGo: System design — distributed rate limiting
snippet: This week we cover three approaches to distributed rate limiting: fixed window, sliding window, and token bucket. Includes architecture diagrams and trade-off comparisons.

subject: TLDR: Anthropic raises $3.5B, new Rust async runtime, Figma IPO
snippet: Today in tech: Anthropic closes Series E at $3.5B valuation • Tokio announces async runtime 2.0 with improved scheduling • Figma confidentially files for IPO.

subject: 20% off Notion Plus — this weekend only
snippet: Upgrade to Notion Plus and get 20% off your first year. Offer expires Sunday at midnight. Use code SPRING20 at checkout. Unlimited blocks, version history, and more.

subject: Introducing Linear Asks — now in beta
snippet: Linear Asks is a lightweight way to request and track help across teams — without leaving your workflow. Try it in beta today. Early access for existing teams is free.

subject: Vercel AI SDK 4.0 — stream faster, deploy smarter
snippet: AI SDK 4.0 is here: streaming is now 3x faster, new useChat hooks for React 19, and first-class support for structured outputs. Read the launch post and upgrade today.
